planet at birth. So first of all you must have before you the
natal chart of the person concerned. A planet is said to be good
in certain positions counted from his own original place in the
radical chart and from those of other planets in the same,
including the Lagna. So what you have to do is to put a dot
in such places and leave the unfavourable positions blank. The
aggregate of all these benefic dots is called the Astakavarga of
that one planet. In this manner you will have to prepare the
Astakavarga charts for the remaining planets. In the case of
Astakavarga charts the counting of houses is done Rlsi-wise
and not Bhava-wise. The Bhava ideology does not work here.
Let us take an example chart.
Moon Mars — —
Lagna
— -
Natal Chart
Sun —
Venus
Merc. Sat. - R. Jup

258 FUNDAMENTALS OF ASTROLOGY
In this chart only the 8 elements that are necessary for the
purpose of the Astakavarga are given. We have to start now
